name: Beef Nacho Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Brown the meat and drain it. Stir in the salsa, sweet corn, Miracle Whip (R), and chili powder.
2. Layer half of the meat mixture, tortilla chips, and cheese in a 2-quart casserole dish. Repeat with the remaining ingredients.
3. Bake for 20 minutes or until thoroughly heated. Top with shredded lettuce and chopped tomato if desired.
